features.name: always block with intra-statement delay and combinational sensitivity
features.description: Code should include an always block with an intra-statement delay (#1ps) that is combinationaly sensitive to a signal driven by another delayed always block

features.name: signal driven by delayed assignment with nanosecond delay
features.description: Code should include a signal that is assigned with a nanosecond delay in an always block, creating a delay trigger for that signal

features.name: intra-statement delay in always block with picosecond delay
features.description: Code should include an always block with an intra-statement delay of one picosecond, where the block reads a signal that has a delay trigger
